vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_04.mp3.transcript: Aw, but Heavy was just getting started!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_05.mp3.transcript: We are strong! We win! And that is end of that!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_06.mp3.transcript: Ha ha ha! We are strong! You are small! And so we win!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_comp_01.mp3.transcript: Is good day to die! For other team!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_comp_02.mp3.transcript: We win game! Hah ha ha!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_comp_03.mp3.transcript: Competitive? Seems like wrong word for this match.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_rare_01.mp3.transcript: Today we have won! There are no more babies to fight! We have fought every baby.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_gamewon_rare_02.mp3.transcript: Sandvich for everyone! We have earned it!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_matchwon_08.mp3.transcript: We win match! Ha ha ha hah!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_03.mp3.transcript: Heavy is ready! Heh ha ha!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_08.mp3.transcript: Team! I believe in all of you!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_09.mp3.transcript: Da di da da! This is morale song!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_6s_01..transcript: Six men is not enough to defeat Heavy!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_6s_02..transcript: Six men is not enough to beat Heavy.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_6s_03..transcript: Heavy is best kept secret of 6s.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_comp_0.transcript: I have seen the enemy! And he is us! But itty bitty.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamefirst_rare_0.transcript: We will crush them! And then Scout can clean up mess after.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamelostlast_01..transcript: We should start the winning now.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamelostlast_02..transcript: All tiny teammates stay calm. This time, we win!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamelostlast_03..transcript: Here is plan: no more losing!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamelostlast_04..transcript: I would be worried, if I was not giant!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamelostlast_06..transcript: This is not usual job for Heavy. But I will make work!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamelostlast_10..transcript: This time we will destroy them!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregametie_01.mp3.transcript: Is tied! Not good for nobody!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregametie_02.mp3.transcript: Now we make them pay for tie!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregametie_03.mp3.transcript: Is tied? Who did this? How did this happen?

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregametie_04.mp3.transcript: Heavy is good at breaking ties! Good at breaking everything!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamewonlast_01.m.transcript: We have broken them. Now we finish it!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamewonlast_02.m.transcript: Be calm! We have not won yet!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamewonlast_04.m.transcript: Now is no time to show mercy!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_pregamewonlast_05.m.transcript: Da dun dun... Ha ha ha!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_01.mp3.transcript: Heavy does not need rank to know he is credit to team!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_03.mp3.transcript: This rank is better! Heh! Heavy likes this new rank!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_05.mp3.transcript: Is not best, but is good!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_10.mp3.transcript: Heavy could get used to ranking up!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_15.mp3.transcript: Ha ha! Yes, we have done it!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_16.mp3.transcript: This was not easy task, but it is done!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_highest_01.m.transcript: In Russia, if hand is rotten, you cut off hand. If arm is rotten, you cut off arm. But if heart is rotten...you cut off leg. This is Russian love song. (sniff) Hmm. Heavy have something in eye.

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_rare_01.mp3.transcript: You like this new rank? Heavy likes this new rank!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_rankup_rare_02.mp3.transcript: In barrel of turnips, there is always one good turnip. Today, we are this turnip!

vo/compmode/cm_heavy_summary_callout_05..transcript: You are giant where it counts: in body size!

vo/heavy_autocappedintelligence02.mp3.transcript: I killed many cowards for that.

vo/heavy_autocappedintelligence03.mp3.transcript: Not usually my job, but... Eheheh.

vo/heavy_autodejectedtie01.mp3.transcript: We lose, but they do not win?

vo/heavy_award01.mp3.transcript: Look at me! Look at me!

vo/heavy_award03.mp3.transcript: It is good day to be Giant Man!

vo/heavy_award08.mp3.transcript: I am most dangerous man, in history of WORLD!

vo/heavy_award09.mp3.transcript: Who dares stand against me NOW?

vo/heavy_award12.mp3.transcript: The medal - it is so tiny!

vo/heavy_award16.mp3.transcript: Now I am king of team!

vo/heavy_cartgoingbackdefense02.mp3.transcript: We send itsy-bitsy cart back home!

vo/heavy_cartmovingforwarddefense04.mp3.transcript: Ooooh noooooo! Little cart is moving!

vo/heavy_cartstaycloseoffense06.mp3.transcript: Bomb is friend! Come, visit friend!

vo/heavy_cartstoppedoffense01.mp3.transcript: Bomb cart will not push self!

vo/heavy_cheers08.mp3.transcript: Do do doh do. Do do do do. Come sing with me! Do do do doh do.

vo/heavy_domination02.mp3.transcript: You are no match for me!

vo/heavy_domination06.mp3.transcript: Hide coward! I will find you.

vo/heavy_domination07.mp3.transcript: I have squashed you like bug!

vo/heavy_domination08.mp3.transcript: I have plan for you: more pain!

vo/heavy_domination10.mp3.transcript: Do I smell soiled baby diaper?

vo/heavy_domination11.mp3.transcript: Uh oh! I think someone soiled diaper!

vo/heavy_domination12.mp3.transcript: I am coming for you, again!

vo/heavy_domination13.mp3.transcript: I promise you pain without end.

vo/heavy_domination15.mp3.transcript: The burning you feel? It is shame.

vo/heavy_domination16.mp3.transcript: I am going to kill you, and kill you, and kill you!

vo/heavy_domination17.mp3.transcript: You are dead. Not big surprise.

vo/heavy_domination18.mp3.transcript: Killing you is full time job now.

vo/heavy_fairyprincess02.mp3.transcript: Heavy is fairy tale... Come to life!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess03.mp3.transcript: Heavy is wish-making fairy... Make wish!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess04.mp3.transcript: HEAVY IS MADE OF SUGAR PLUMS!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess06.mp3.transcript: Bah, Heavy is regretting costume choice.

vo/heavy_fairyprincess07.mp3.transcript: Ooh. This was poor costume choice.

vo/heavy_fairyprincess08.mp3.transcript: DID YOU WISH FOR HEAVY TO KILL YOU? WISH GRANTED!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess09.mp3.transcript: I am dressed like little girl... You are still biggest baby!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess13.mp3.transcript: Come closer. Heavy is little pixie-person. He vill not crush you.

vo/heavy_fairyprincess14.mp3.transcript: Tell Heavy he is prettiest princess! NOW!!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess15.mp3.transcript: Pretty little princess is here to KILL YOU!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess16.mp3.transcript: Heavy... Is Anastasia, Russian princess. Is serious historical COSTUME!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess17.mp3.transcript: Russian tooth-fairy has come for all your teeth!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess18.mp3.transcript: Give teeth to Russian tooth-fairy. Those are the People's teeth. For all to share!

vo/heavy_fairyprincess19.mp3.transcript: Russian tooth-fairy has come for ALL YOUR TEETH! (laughs wickedly)

vo/heavy_helpmedefend02.mp3.transcript: Who's man enough to stand with me?

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_domination01.mp3.transcript: As promised, Heavy will now lay egg in your mouth.

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_domination02.mp3.transcript: Now Bird Heavy will vomit worms down your throat.

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_round_start02.mp3.transcript: Heavy has tiny bird head! Never speak of this.

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_round_start03.mp3.transcript: I am coming, cowards! To lay eggs in your mouth!

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_round_start04.mp3.transcript: I live! ...With grotesque bird head. Is horrible!

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_round_start05.mp3.transcript: Bird-Heavy lives! Hide your seeds and millet, cowards!

vo/heavy_item_birdhead_uber03.mp3.transcript: Hide, worms! Crawl from bulletproof Bird-Heavy!

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_domination01.mp3.transcript: Heavy is wearing pink pony costume, and you are still biggest idiot.

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_domination02.mp3.transcript: Ha-ha-ha-ha! Yes, man in pink wig is laughing at you!

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_round_start01.mp3.transcript: You cannot hide from pink pony Heavy!

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_round_start04.mp3.transcript: Heavy is magic pink horse! This is the last we will mention it.

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_round_start05.mp3.transcript: Run, cowards! Run from magic pink Heavy!

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_uber01.mp3.transcript: Ha-ha-ha! I am bulletproof pink pony!

vo/heavy_item_unicorn_uber02.mp3.transcript: Get behind pretty pink pony mane, Doctor!

vo/heavy_jeers06.mp3.transcript: Which one of you is crying?

vo/heavy_jeers07.mp3.transcript: Bah! Too many little men on this team!

vo/heavy_jeers08.mp3.transcript: Tell me, where did we go so wrong?

vo/heavy_laughlong02.mp3.transcript: (Laugh) Ho, hohoho, oh, that slaps me on the knee!

vo/heavy_meleedare05.mp3.transcript: I will kill you with bare hands!

vo/heavy_meleedare09.mp3.transcript: Is not fair to use gun on such a tiny man.

vo/heavy_meleedare10.mp3.transcript: Why waste bullet on such a teeny man?

vo/heavy_meleedare13.mp3.transcript: Let us fight; man versus tiny baby man.

vo/heavy_mvm_ask_ready03.mp3.transcript: What coward is still not ready to fight?

vo/heavy_mvm_ask_ready04.mp3.transcript: Who is not ready to fight?

vo/heavy_mvm_close_call02.mp3.transcript: Whew. I'm getting too old and giant for this.

vo/heavy_mvm_collect_credits02.mp3.transcript: Come, help me pick up money.

vo/heavy_mvm_get_upgrade02.mp3.transcript: It is good day to be Giant Man.

vo/heavy_mvm_get_upgrade05.mp3.transcript: Hmmm, tiny robots are in big trouble now.

vo/heavy_mvm_loot_godlike01.mp3.transcript: This is the best thing! It is best thing!

vo/heavy_mvm_loot_godlike03.mp3.transcript: Ya da da da! Best thing! Heavy owns best thing! It is his, do not touch, or he will kill you! Da dum da dum dum! (laughs)

vo/heavy_mvm_loot_rare02.mp3.transcript: Ah, have not seen many of this!

vo/heavy_mvm_mannhattan_gate_atk02.mp3.transcript: Little metal men try to take gate!

vo/heavy_mvm_mighty_robot02.mp3.transcript: Not so mighty now, tiny giant.

vo/heavy_mvm_resurrect02.mp3.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Heavy is back, babies!

vo/heavy_mvm_say_ready03.mp3.transcript: I am ready to fight robots.

vo/heavy_mvm_say_ready05.mp3.transcript: Bring me metal men to fight.

vo/heavy_mvm_sentry_buster02.mp3.transcript: I have crushed tiny Sentry Buster!

vo/heavy_mvm_stand_alone02.mp3.transcript: Robots! I will beat you myself!

vo/heavy_mvm_taunt01.mp3.transcript: I am destroyer of metal men.

vo/heavy_mvm_taunt02.mp3.transcript: Metal cowards, run from giant man! (Laughs)

vo/heavy_mvm_wave_end02.mp3.transcript: Run, robots! Run back to metal baby house!

vo/heavy_mvm_wave_end05.mp3.transcript: Robots! I crush you. You are itty bitty.

vo/heavy_revenge01.mp3.transcript: You mean nothing to me now.

vo/heavy_revenge03.mp3.transcript: Let this be lesson for you.

vo/heavy_revenge05.mp3.transcript: You are not so good as you think.

vo/heavy_revenge07.mp3.transcript: I should have done this long ago!

vo/heavy_revenge08.mp3.transcript: Did you think you could beat me?

vo/heavy_revenge09.mp3.transcript: Did you think I would forget you?!

vo/heavy_revenge10.mp3.transcript: Oh no, you I do not forget!

vo/heavy_revenge11.mp3.transcript: I think you should fight someone much, much smaller.

vo/heavy_revenge13.mp3.transcript: Next time, pick on someone your own tiny-baby size!

vo/heavy_revenge14.mp3.transcript: I am not done with you yet!

vo/heavy_revenge15.mp3.transcript: This is just the beginning of the pain I will cause you.

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt04.mp3.transcript: I am full of sandvich, and I am coming for you!

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt05.mp3.transcript: Sandvich and I are coming for you!

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt07.mp3.transcript: Bologna is perfect fuel for killing tiny cowards!

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt10.mp3.transcript: What was that, Sandvich? 'Kill them all'? Good idea! Hahahahahaha!

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt11.mp3.transcript: Look at you tiny-itty-bitty men running from sandvich!

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt12.mp3.transcript: You are a loose cannon, Sandvich, but you are a damn good cop!

vo/heavy_sandwichtaunt13.mp3.transcript: Sandvich and me going to beat your ass!

vo/heavy_sf12_badmagic03.mp3.transcript: Bomb for head? (chuckles) Now Heavy has seen everything!

vo/heavy_sf12_badmagic08.mp3.transcript: Oh, Heavy does not feel right.

vo/heavy_sf12_goodmagic01.mp3.transcript: Heavy is flying! Is greatest moment of Heavy's life!

vo/heavy_sf12_goodmagic03.mp3.transcript: Hah! Stupid wizard makes Heavy invincible!

vo/heavy_sf12_healing02.mp3.transcript: Kill wizard! He is healing himself!

vo/heavy_sf12_seeking01.mp3.transcript: Yah da yalatata. Looking for wizard. Going to crush him. Yah deedamdah yamdal.

vo/heavy_sf12_seeking02.mp3.transcript: Deeyantoyah Yavozongeyalavuzhah. This is the song when looking for the wizard. Haygavlalashamo herdalachtarah!

vo/heavy_sf12_seeking06.mp3.transcript: Little wizard baby wants Heavy to play hide-and-seek?

vo/heavy_singing01.mp3.transcript: (Mily Balakirev's Song of the Volga Boatmen)

vo/heavy_singing02.mp3.transcript: (Mily Balakirev's Song of the Volga Boatmen)

vo/heavy_singing03.mp3.transcript: (Mily Balakirev's Song of the Volga Boatmen) C'mon!

vo/heavy_singing04.mp3.transcript: (Mily Balakirev's Song of the Volga Boatmen) Push!

vo/heavy_specialcompleted08.mp3.transcript: Ooohhhh, run, run, I'm coming for you!

vo/heavy_specialweapon01.mp3.transcript: My fists! They are made of STEEL!

vo/heavy_specialweapon04.mp3.transcript: All will fear my giant new gun.

vo/heavy_specialweapon05.mp3.transcript: I have new way to kill cowards.

vo/heavy_specialweapon06.mp3.transcript: New gun is unfair to tiny baby enemies.

vo/heavy_specialweapon07.mp3.transcript: I am Heavy Weapons Guy, and this is my new weapon.

vo/heavy_specialweapon09.mp3.transcript: Yes. I like this new weapon.

vo/heavy_standonthepoint01.mp3.transcript: You! Stupid! Come, stand on point!

vo/heavy_yell10.mp3.transcript: Who sent all these babies to fight?

vo/heavy_yell12.mp3.transcript: It's good time to run, cowards!

vo/heavy_yell15.mp3.transcript: Ooohhhh, run, run, I'm coming for you!

vo/heavy_yell6.mp3.transcript: You are so small! Is funny to me!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_01.mp3.transcript: Ha ho, ha ha ha! Hoh, hoh, hoh! Ha ha! Hah haah! Yaa!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_05.mp3.transcript: Oh ya! Da, da, da! Ya hah! Ho hah ya! Yah!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_06.mp3.transcript: Ohhhh! Who is great? Ha ha ha!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_08.mp3.transcript: Yo hoh! Ya toh ho! Ha ha, ha ha ha! Ha ha, ha ha ha! Hoh hoh!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_17.mp3.transcript: Ho hoh! Ya hyeh ta! Yah ha ha ha, ha ha!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_22.mp3.transcript: Ya ya ya ya! Da da da da!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_37.mp3.transcript: Very much this! I also give this! Then I do this! Then Heavy is done! Hah!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_aerobic_40.mp3.transcript: Heavy does this move...then this move...then he does this...and Heavy is done!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_taunt_cong_fun_11..transcript: Heavy show you, ah ha ha!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_taunt_cong_int_09..transcript: All of you are dancing babies!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_taunt_dosi_end_03..transcript: Ha ha ha, is good hey!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_taunt_dosi_end_04..transcript: Ha ha ha ha! Okay, enough.

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_taunt_flip_end_02..transcript: Ha ha! I am an animal!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_taunt_rps_lose_11..transcript: Next time I will crush you!

vo/taunts/heavy/heavy_trade_14.mp3.transcript: Everything you have is bad, compared to THIS thing.

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts02.mp3.transcript: You are so small! Is funny to me!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts08.mp3.transcript: You, yes you! You are dead!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts09.mp3.transcript: I was told we would be fighting men!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts10.mp3.transcript: Who send all these babies to fight!?

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts12.mp3.transcript: I am amused by entire eety-beety-teeny team!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts13.mp3.transcript: I hear someone building diaper changing station!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts15.mp3.transcript: You are going to need much bigger guns!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts16.mp3.transcript: Is good time to run, cowards!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts17.mp3.transcript: Go ahead! Build your tiny gun! Then run!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts18.mp3.transcript: I think you need more men!

vo/taunts/heavy_taunts19.mp3.transcript: What sick man sends babies to fight me?

vo/toughbreak/heavy_quest_complete_easy_.transcript: Aww, but Heavy was just getting started!

vo/toughbreak/heavy_quest_complete_hard_.transcript: Ha, ha! Yes, we have done it!
This was not easy task, but it is done!
